zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas FitzWilliam IV於1388年4月出生在英國林可爾史爾時，他的父親Sir Thomas FitzWilliam III21歲，母親Elizabeth Aske25歲。他與Margaret Ann Dymoke結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1479年4月9日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾林肯享年91歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾林肯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas FitzWilliam IV于1388年4月出生在英国林可爾史爾时，他的父亲Sir Thomas FitzWilliam III21岁，母亲Elizabeth Aske25岁。他与Margaret Ann Dymoke结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1479年4月9日在英国英格兰林可爾史爾林肯享年91岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾林肯。

nameMeanings.name: FitzWilliam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (of Norman origin): from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name William .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas FitzWilliam IV was born in April 1388, in Lincolnshire, England, his father, Sir Thomas FitzWilliam III, was 21 and his mother, Elizabeth Aske, was 25. He married Margaret Ann Dymoke. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 9 April 1479, in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 91, and was buried in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas FitzWilliam IV est né en avril 1388, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas FitzWilliam III, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Aske, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Ann Dymoke. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 9 avril 1479, à Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 91 ans, et a été enterré à Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas FitzWilliam IV im April 1388 in Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas FitzWilliam III 21 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Aske 25. Er hat Margaret Ann Dymoke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 9. April 1479 im Alter von 91 Jahren in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas FitzWilliam IV è nato il nel aprile 1388 nel Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas FitzWilliam III, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Aske, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Ann Dymoke. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 9 aprile 1479, nel Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 91 anni, e fu sepolto a Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas FitzWilliam IVが1388年4月にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas FitzWilliam IIIは21歳，母Elizabeth Askeは25歳であった。Margaret Ann Dymokeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1479年4月9日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアリンコルンで91歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアリンコルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas FitzWilliam IV(이)가 1388년 4월 영국 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas FitzWilliam III(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Aske(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Margaret Ann Dymoke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1479년 4월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 링코컨에서 91세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 링코컨에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas FitzWilliam IV nasceu em abril de 1388, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas FitzWilliam III, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Aske, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Ann Dymoke. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de abril de 1479, em Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 91 anos, e foi sepultado em Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas FitzWilliam IV родился апрель 1388 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas FitzWilliam III было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Aske, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Ann Dymoke. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 9 апреля 1479 г. в местности линколн, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 91 год и был похоронен в местности линколн, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas FitzWilliam IV nació en abril de 1388, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas FitzWilliam III, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Aske, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Margaret Ann Dymoke. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 9 de abril de 1479, en Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 91 años, y fue sepultado en Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
